message:
feat(checkpoint): add compression, auto-checkpointing, and compaction services

- Add gzip compression support with base64 encoding for JSON storage
- Add compression/decompression utilities with stats tracking
- Create AutoCheckpointService with configurable triggers:
  - Time interval-based checkpoints
  - Message count threshold
  - Token count threshold
  - Cooldown to prevent duplicate checkpoints
- Create CheckpointCompactionService for delta chain management:
  - Scheduled compaction runs
  - Expired checkpoint deletion with retention policy
  - Delta chain consolidation
  - Storage statistics reporting
- Add compression tests verifying round-trip consistency
- Update checkpoint tests with new compression scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
